name: 津軽 (Tsugaru)
author: ahkimn
description: Highly-detailed map of the historic region of 津軽 (Tsugaru) in 青森県 (Aomori Prefecture). The map centers on the peninsula of the same name and includes the snowy cities of 青森 (Aomori) and 弘前 (Hirosaki). Demand data is sourced from the 2020/2021 Japanese census data, and the map includes special demand for primary/secondary/post-secondary education + airports + ports + hospitals + various cultural attractions"
data_source: 統計局・令和２年国勢調査・令和3年経済センサス
